problem id: 1c3f2ff9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR NOT SHR(5)

examples:
  11001110 -> 11111101
  10111101 -> 11111011
  10001101 -> 11111011
  11000011 -> 11111101
  00000110 -> 11111111
  11111101 -> 11111111
  01001001 -> 11111101
  01100100 -> 11111110
  00110101 -> 11111111

query: 10010101
predicted answer: 11111011
